cards.title: ChatGPT
cards.description: OpenAI's conversational AI — great for writing, coding, and brainstorming.

cards.description: Anthropic's AI assistant — helpful, harmless, and honest.

cards.description: AI assistant built into Microsoft 365 and Windows — your everyday AI.

cards.title: DeepSeek
cards.description: High-performance AI model from DeepSeek — strong at reasoning and code.

cards.title: Perplexity AI

cards.title: Meta AI
cards.description: Meta's AI assistant built into Facebook, Instagram, WhatsApp and the web.

cards.title: Anthropic Academy
cards.description: Learn prompt engineering and how to get the best out of Claude.

cards.title: OpenAI Academy
cards.description: Free courses, prompt guides and developer docs from the makers of ChatGPT and GPT-4.

cards.title: Google Gemini
cards.description: Learn to use Gemini — Google's multimodal AI — via the Gemini app, AI Studio and Vertex AI.

cards.title: Hugging Face
cards.description: The home of open-source AI — free courses, 1M+ models, and hands-on ML tools.

cards.title: Setting Up GitHub Pages
cards.description: Step-by-step guide to hosting your first static website for free.

cards.title: Writing Better Prompts
cards.description: Practical tips for getting great results from AI tools like Claude.

cards.title: Getting Started with Claude Code
cards.description: Install, configure and run your first Claude Code session in minutes.

cards.title: Getting Started with AI Agents
cards.description: What AI agents are, how they work, and how to get started safely as an IT professional.

cards.title: Getting Started with OpenClaw
cards.description: Install and use OpenClaw — the open-source personal AI assistant that lives on your machine.

cards.title: Getting Started with Vibe Coding
cards.description: Build real software using plain English and AI tools — no coding experience required.

cards.title: Intro to AI for IT Pros
cards.description: A 35-minute beginner's guide to generative AI — covering neural networks, tokens, prompting, RAG, hallucinations and more.

cards.title: AI-Assisted Coding Tutorial
cards.description: A hands-on tutorial showing how to build and ship projects faster using AI coding tools.

cards.title: Intro to Large Language Models
cards.description: A 1-hour general-audience introduction to Large Language Models — the core technical component behind systems like ChatGPT, Claude, and Bard.
